title: AI boom fuels inflation fears, complicating Fed’s next rate move
summary: Ongoing strong demand for AI infrastructure “would likely sustain upward pressure on prices for technology products and electricity,” Federal Reserve policymakers said.

title: Crypto VC Paradigm raises $1.2B to push into AI
summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm is widening its investment gaze toward AI and other frontier industries with its latest fund.

title: Japan’s Five-Year Bond Sale Sees Decent Demand on Higher Yields
summary: Demand at Japan’s five-year bond sale on Thursday was broadly in line with recent auctions, showing that elevated yields are attracting some buyers.

title: Goldman Says Hormuz Flare-Up May Delay Recovery in Oil Supplies
summary: A recovery in Middle Eastern oil supplies could be set back if renewed tensions disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, Goldman Sachs Group Inc. said.

title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.

title: The New Grok 4.5 Is Out. Elon Musk Says It Competes With Last Year's Claude Opus
summary: SpaceXAI's new coding model is cheaper and faster than Anthropic and OpenAI's flagships—and by Musk's own account, at least one generation behind them.

title: Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion Fund as Crypto VC Pushes Further Into AI
summary: The investment firm said its fourth fund will back AI, robotics, and crypto startups as it broadens beyond digital assets.

title: Sen. Wyden urges Senate leaders to preserve contested blockchain developer protections in broader crypto bill
summary: Democratic Sen. Ron Wyden is urging Senate leaders to ensure a provision protecting blockchain software developers remains in the crypto bill.

title: Binance Wallet adds Plume’s yield vault offering access to Invesco and Bitwise funds
summary: Binance Wallet has added Plume's yield vault, giving users access to tokenized funds managed by Invesco and Bitwise.

title: US carries out second day of strikes against Iran
summary: Donald Trump claims Iran ‘called’ to negotiate but casts doubt on the prospects of a deal
